subcodes.first_line: The Call hath been raised from the Crimson Tree in the Most Exalted Paradise: God, there is none other God but Him, the Single, the One, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع الندآء من السدره الحمرآء فی الفردوس الاعلی الله لا اله هو الفرد الواحد المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prayer for women
